description: A 7-day workout plan designed for beginners focusing on building endurance.

tasks.description: Perform Russian twists, pull-ups, and squats.

tasks.fallback_version: Perform Russian twists with knees on the floor, assisted pull-ups, and bodyweight squats.

tasks.description: Perform burpees, running, and shoulder press.
tasks.success_criteria: Complete all prescribed sets and reps for burpees, running, and shoulder press.
tasks.fallback_version: Perform modified burpees (without jump), jogging in place, and lighter weight shoulder press.

tasks.description: Active recovery or complete rest.
tasks.success_criteria: Dedicate the day to rest and recovery.
tasks.fallback_version: Light stretching or a short walk.

tasks.description: Perform planks, tricep dips, and shoulder press.
tasks.success_criteria: Complete all prescribed sets and reps for planks, tricep dips, and shoulder press.
tasks.fallback_version: Perform knee planks, chair dips, and lighter weight shoulder press.

tasks.description: Perform walking, planks, and squats.
tasks.success_criteria: Complete all prescribed sets and reps for walking, planks, and squats.
tasks.fallback_version: Shorter duration walking, knee planks, and bodyweight squats.

tasks.description: Active recovery or complete rest.
tasks.success_criteria: Dedicate the day to rest and recovery.
tasks.fallback_version: Light stretching or a short walk.

tasks.success_criteria: Dedicate the day to rest and recovery.

goal: Create a 7-day workout plan for weight loss
description: A 7-day workout plan for an advanced individual aiming for weight loss.

baseline.fixed_constraints: User is 34-year-old female, 169 cm height, 72 kg weight.
baseline.physical_constraints: User is advanced at the gym.

tasks.description: Perform jump rope (3 sets of 20 reps), pull-ups (3 sets of 20 reps), and burpees (3 sets of 15 reps).
tasks.success_criteria: All prescribed sets and reps completed for jump rope, pull-ups, and burpees.
tasks.fallback_version: Perform jump rope (2 sets of 15 reps), assisted pull-ups (3 sets of 10 reps), and modified burpees (3 sets of 10 reps).

tasks.description: Perform sit-ups (3 sets of 12 reps), pull-ups (3 sets of 10 reps), and planks (3 sets of 8 reps).
tasks.success_criteria: All prescribed sets and reps completed for sit-ups, pull-ups, and planks.
tasks.fallback_version: Perform crunches (3 sets of 15 reps), assisted pull-ups (3 sets of 8 reps), and knee planks (3 sets of 30 seconds).

tasks.description: Rest day. Focus on recovery and light activity if desired.
tasks.success_criteria: No strenuous physical activity.
tasks.fallback_version: Active recovery such as stretching or a light walk.

tasks.description: Perform deadlifts (3 sets of 10 reps), mountain climbers (3 sets of 10 reps), and cycling (3 sets of 15 reps).
tasks.success_criteria: All prescribed sets and reps completed for deadlifts, mountain climbers, and cycling.
tasks.fallback_version: Perform Romanian deadlifts (3 sets of 12 reps), high-knee sprints in place (3 sets of 30 seconds), and stationary cycling at moderate intensity (3 sets of 10 minutes).

tasks.description: Perform dumbbell rows (3 sets of 15 reps), bench press (3 sets of 6 reps), and high knees (3 sets of 10 reps).
tasks.success_criteria: All prescribed sets and reps completed for dumbbell rows, bench press, and high knees.
tasks.fallback_version: Perform single-arm dumbbell rows (3 sets of 12 reps per arm), dumbbell bench press (3 sets of 8 reps), and moderate-intensity high knees (3 sets of 30 seconds).

tasks.description: Rest day. Focus on recovery and light activity if desired.
tasks.success_criteria: No strenuous physical activity.
tasks.fallback_version: Active recovery such as stretching or a light walk.

tasks.success_criteria: Successfully complete all sets and repetitions with good form.
